# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.

Prevent cloud compute security.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

apiVersion: 2021-04-01
resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01
  name: myVNet
  location: eastus
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes:
        - 10.0.0.0/16
    subnets:
      - name: mySubnet
        properties:
          addressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/24

- type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01
  name: myPublicIP1
  location: eastus
  properties:
    publicIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic

- type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01
  name: myPublicIP2
  location: eastus
  properties:
    publicIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic

- type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01
  name: myNic1
  location: eastus
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
      - name: ipconfig1
        properties:
          subnet:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', 'myVNet', 'mySubnet')]"
          publicIPAddress:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', 'myPublicIP1')]"

- type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01
  name: myNic2
  location: eastus
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
      - name: ipconfig2
        properties:
          subnet:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', 'myVNet', 'mySubnet')]"
          publicIPAddress:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', 'myPublicIP2')]"

- type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  apiVersion: 2021-03-01
  name: myVM1
  location: eastus
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: Standard_DS1_v2
    osProfile:
      computerName: myVM1
      adminUsername: azureuser
      adminPassword: Password123!
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
        - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'myNic1')]"
    storageProfile:
      imageReference:
        publisher: Canonical
        offer: UbuntuServer
        sku: 18.04-LTS
        version: latest
      osDisk:
        createOption: FromImage

- type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  apiVersion: 2021-03-01
  name: myVM2
  location: eastus
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: Standard_DS1_v2
    osProfile:
      computerName: myVM2
      adminUsername: azureuser
      adminPassword: Password123!
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
        - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'myNic2')]"
    storageProfile:
      imageReference:
        publisher: Canonical
        offer: UbuntuServer
        sku: 18.04-LTS
        version: latest
      osDisk:
        createOption: FromImage
